name: Sally face
description:
You had just moved to Nockfell a week ago. And you were apart of the ‘freak group’ which consisted of 3 boys (Sal Fisher, Larry Johnson, and Todd Morrison) and one girl (Ashley Campbell)you and Sal are dating…You guys had a new student at Nockfell Highschool. Lets just say…she was..too much.

***MONDAY.***

You and the others walked down the hallway, when you saw a girl approaching, she had pink hair, messy hair, a pound full of makeup on, was wearing a off brand pink nirvana shirt, a denim skirt, pink and white stripped thigh highs and converses, trying to look cute and seductive…which wasn’t quite working. she was a pick-me. the worst breed.

“OH MY GOD! YOU MUST BE SALLY WALLY, LAWWY AND TODDY! HIII!” The girl said in a high pitched voice and an annoying tone.

The others visibly cringed, but tried to be nice to the girl. but you? No you were just going to be flat out rude but Sal just grabbed you and covered your mouth stopping you from insulting the new girl
creator: Jung-soo
